Operation 'getTest' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are identical and lack specificity. Improved version clarifies what 'test details' means (configuration vs results), specifies the return value structure, and helps AI agents understand the distinction between test configuration and test results.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve load test configuration and metadata
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the configuration, settings, and metadata for a specific load test identified by test_id. Returns the complete Test object including test parameters, target URL, load profile, and current status. Does not return test execution results - use listTestResults or getTestResult for result data.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and lack specificity. Improved version clarifies what 'test details' means (configuration vs results), specifies the return value structure, and helps AI agents understand the distinction between test configuration and test results.

message: Operation 'stopTest' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented, but description is too brief. Enhanced description clarifies the precondition (test must be running), the side effect (status change), and what happens to collected data, improving AI agent understanding of operation effects.

data.description_suggestion: Terminates execution of an active load test identified by test_id. Only affects tests currently in running state. Returns the updated Test object with status changed to stopped. Partial results collected up to the stop point remain available.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented, but description is too brief. Enhanced description clarifies the precondition (test must be running), the side effect (status change), and what happens to collected data, improving AI agent understanding of operation effects.

message: Operation 'listTestResults' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description lacks detail about what constitutes 'results' and what metrics are included. Enhanced version specifies the return structure and key metrics, helping AI agents understand what data is available.

data.current_description: Returns all results for a test.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all TestResult objects for a specific load test identified by test_id. Returns a collection of results from each test execution, including metrics such as response times, throughput, error rates, and request counts. Results are ordered by execution timestamp.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks detail about what constitutes 'results' and what metrics are included. Enhanced version specifies the return structure and key metrics, helping AI agents understand what data is available.

message: Operation 'getTestResult' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are identical and lack specificity. Improved version clarifies that this retrieves metrics from a specific execution, specifies key metrics included, and distinguishes between a single result and the collection of results, enhancing AI agent interpretability.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve detailed metrics for a test execution
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed performance metrics and statistics for a specific test execution identified by test_id and result_id. Returns the complete TestResult object including response time distribution, throughput, error rates, request counts, and other load test performance indicators. Each result represents a single test run.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and lack specificity. Improved version clarifies that this retrieves metrics from a specific execution, specifies key metrics included, and distinguishes between a single result and the collection of results, enhancing AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getApp' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description is repetitive and lacks specificity. It doesn't explain what information is returned or what the app_id parameter represents. Enhanced description clarifies the input parameter, return value structure, and includes relevant domain context about verification status.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific registered application/target host by app ID. Returns the application object containing configuration, verification status, and metadata.
data.reasoning: Description is repetitive and lacks specificity. It doesn't explain what information is returned or what the app_id parameter represents. Enhanced description clarifies the input parameter, return value structure, and includes relevant domain context about verification status.

message: Operation 'deleteApp' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is minimal and repetitive. Missing critical information about side effects (deletion of associated tests/results), permanence of the action, and what parameters are required. AI agents need this context to understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a registered application and all associated tests and results. This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Requires the app ID of the application to delete.
data.reasoning: Description is minimal and repetitive. Missing critical information about side effects (deletion of associated tests/results), permanence of the action, and what parameters are required. AI agents need this context to understand the destructive nature of this operation.

message: Operation 'verifyApp' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description lacks input details (which verification method to use, how to specify it) and output details (what is returned, what happens on success/failure). Enhanced description clarifies the three verification methods, required inputs, and expected response to help AI agents execute this operation correctly.

data.current_description: Verifies domain ownership using DNS, HTTP, or token method.
data.description_suggestion: Verifies domain ownership for a registered application using one of three methods: DNS record validation, HTTP file verification, or token-based verification. Requires the app ID and verification method specification. Returns verification status and method-specific instructions if verification is pending.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks input details (which verification method to use, how to specify it) and output details (what is returned, what happens on success/failure). Enhanced description clarifies the three verification methods, required inputs, and expected response to help AI agents execute this operation correctly.

message: Operation 'listTests' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Summary is too generic and doesn't include domain context (load tests). Description lacks context about scope (all tests vs. app-specific) and what information is included in the response. Improved summary adds domain terminology, and description clarifies scope and response content for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns a list of all configured tests.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of all configured load tests across all registered applications. Each test includes configuration details, status, and scheduling information.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic and doesn't include domain context (load tests). Description lacks context about scope (all tests vs. app-specific) and what information is included in the response. Improved summary adds domain terminology, and description clarifies scope and response content for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'createTest' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary lacks domain terminology (load test). Description is too vague about what inputs are required and what is returned. Enhanced summary adds 'load test' context, and description specifies required inputs (app ID, URL, load parameters), expected outputs (test object with ID), and explains how the returned test ID is used downstream.

data.current_description: Creates a new load test configuration.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new load test configuration
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new load test configuration for a registered application. Requires specifying the target app ID, test URL, load profile (concurrent users, duration, ramp-up), and test type. Returns the created test object with a unique test ID that can be used to run or monitor the test.
data.reasoning: Summary lacks domain terminology (load test). Description is too vague about what inputs are required and what is returned. Enhanced summary adds 'load test' context, and description specifies required inputs (app ID, URL, load parameters), expected outputs (test object with ID), and explains how the returned test ID is used downstream.
